description:
Analyze the capture file ~/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng to identify the TCP connection with the highest latency based on the TCP Round Trip Time (tcp.analysis.ack_rtt). Document the details of the packet with the maximum RTT in a report at ~/Documents/captures/latency_report.txt using the following format:

max_rtt_packet_number: <Packet Number>
max_rtt_value_seconds: <RTT Value>
bad_stream_index: <Stream Index>

Export the entire TCP stream (tcp.stream) associated with this high-latency packet to ~/Documents/captures/slow_stream.pcapng.
